verses.geez:
ወዝውእቱ ፡ ዘትገብር ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትቀድሶሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትለአኩኒ ፡ ወንሣእ ፡ ላህመ ፡ እምአልህምት ፡ ወአባግዐ ፡
                  ንጹሓተ ፡ ፪ ፤

translations.lxx: And these are the things which thou shalt do to them: thou shalt sanctify them, so that they shall serve me in the priesthood; and thou shalt take one young calf from the herd, and two unblemished rams;
translations.kjv: And this is the thing that thou shalt do unto them to hallow them, to minister unto me in the priest’s office: Take one young bullock, and two rams without blemish,

verses.geez: ወ[ኅብ]ስተ ፡ ናእተ ፡ ልውሰ ፡ በቅብእ ፡ [ወጸራይቀ ፡ ናእት ፡ ዘበቅብእ ፡] ዘስንዳሌ ፡ እምስርናይ ፡ ትገብሮን ።

translations.lxx: and unleavened loaves kneaded with oil, and unleavened cakes anointed with oil: thou shalt make them of fine flour of wheat.
translations.kjv: And unleavened bread, and cakes unleavened tempered with oil, and wafers unleavened anointed with oil: of wheaten flour shalt thou make them.

verses.geez: ወታነብሮ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ገሐፍት ፡ ወላህሞኒ ፡ ወክልኤ ፡ አባግዖ ፡ ታነብር ፡ [ዲበ ፡] ገሐፍት ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt put them on one basket, and thou shalt offer them on the basket, and the young calf and the two rams.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt put them into one basket, and bring them in the basket, with the bullock and the two rams.

verses.geez: ወለአሮን ፡ ወለ፪ደቂቁ ፡ ታቀርቦሙ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡር ፡ ወተኀፅቦሙ ፡ በማይ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt bring Aaron and his sons to the doors of the tabernacle of testimony, and thou shalt wash them with water.
translations.kjv: And Aaron and his sons thou shalt bring unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, and shalt wash them with water.

verses.geez:
ወነሢአከ ፡ አልባሲሁ ፡ አል[ብ]ሶ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ እኁከ ፡ ወልብሱ ፡ ዘጶዴሬ ፡ ወመልበስቱ ፡ ትቀርብ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ማዕፈርት
                  ።

translations.lxx: And having taken the garments, thou shalt put on Aaron thy brother both the full-length robe and the ephod and the oracle; and thou shalt join for him the oracle to the ephod.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt take the garments, and put upon Aaron the coat, and the robe of the ephod, and the ephod, and the breastplate, and gird him with the curious girdle of the ephod:

verses.geez: ወቆብዖ ፡ ትወዲ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ርእሱ ፡ ወታነብር ፡ ቀጸላ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ቆብዑ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt put the mitre on his head; and thou shalt put the plate, even the Holiness, on the mitre.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt put the mitre upon his head, and put the holy crown upon the mitre.

verses.geez: ወትነሥእ ፡ እምቅብእ ፡ ዘባረከ ፡ ወትክዑ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ርእሱ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt take of the anointing oil, and thou shalt pour it on his head, and shalt anoint him,
translations.kjv: Then shalt thou take the anointing oil, and pour it upon his head, and anoint him.

verses.geez: ወለደቂቁኒ ፡ ታቀርቦሙ ፡ ወታለብሶሙ ፡ አልባሲሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: and thou shalt bring his sons, and put garments on them.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt bring his sons, and put coats upon them.

verses.geez:
ወታቀንቶሙ ፡ ቅናታቲሆሙ ፡ ወትወዲ ፡ ዲቤሆሙ ፡ ማዕፈርቶሙ ፡ ወይከውናሆሙ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ለዓለም ፡ ወትፌጽም ፡
                  እደዊሁ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወእደወ ፡ ውሉዱ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt gird them with the girdles, and put the tires upon them, and they shall have a priestly office to me for ever; and thou shalt fill the hands of Aaron and the hands of his sons.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt gird them with girdles, Aaron and his sons, and put the bonnets on them: and the priest’s office shall be theirs for a perpetual statute: and thou shalt consecrate Aaron and his sons.

verses.geez:
ወታቀርብ ፡ ላህመ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡር ፡ ወያነብሩ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወደቂቁ ፡ እደዊሆሙ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ርእሰ ፡
                  ላህሙ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡር ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt bring the calf to the door of the tabernacle of witness; and Aaron and his sons shall lay their hands on the head of the calf, before the Lord, by the doors of the tabernacle of witness.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt cause a bullock to be brought before the tabernacle of the congregation: and Aaron and his sons shall put their hands upon the head of the bullock.

verses.geez: ወተሐርድ ፡ ላህሞ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡር ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt slay the calf before the Lord, by the doors of the tabernacle of witness.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt kill the bullock before the LORD, by the door of the tabernacle of the congregation.

verses.geez:
ወንሣእ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደመ ፡ ላህሙ ፡ ወትወዲ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አቅርንተ ፡ [ምሥዋዕ ፡] በአጽባዕትከ ፡ ወዘተርፈ ፡ ኵሎ ፡
                  ደሞ ፡ ከዐው ፡ ጠቃ ፡ [ምሥዋዕ ።]

translations.lxx: And thou shalt take of the blood of the calf, and put it on the horns of the altar with thy finger, but all the rest of the blood thou shalt pour out at the foot of the altar.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt take of the blood of the bullock, and put it upon the horns of the altar with thy finger, and pour all the blood beside the bottom of the altar.

verses.geez:
ወትነሥእ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ስብሐ ፡ ከርሡ ፡ ወከብዶ ፡ ወክልኤ ፡ ኵልያቶ ፡ [ወስብሐ ፡ ኵሊቱ ፡] ወታነብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt take all the fat that is on the belly, and the lobe of the liver, and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, and shalt put them upon the altar.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt take all the fat that covereth the inwards, and the caul that is above the liver, and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, and burn them upon the altar.

verses.geez: ወሥጋ ፡ ላህሙ ፡ ወማእሶ ፡ ወፅፍዖ ፡ ታውዒ ፡ አውፂአከ ፡ አፍአ ፡ እም[ትዕይንት ፡] እስመ ፡ ለኀጢአት ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: But the flesh of the calf, and his skin, and his dung, shalt thou burn with fire without the camp; for it is an offering on account of sin.
translations.kjv: But the flesh of the bullock, and his skin, and his dung, shalt thou burn with fire without the camp: it is a sin offering.

verses.geez: ወትነሥእ ፡ አሐደ ፡ በግዐ ፡ ወያነብሩ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወደቂቁ ፡ እደዊሆሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ርእሰ ፡ በግዑ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt take one ram, and Aaron and his sons shall lay their hands on the head of the ram.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt also take one ram; and Aaron and his sons shall put their hands upon the head of the ram.

verses.geez:
ወተሐርደ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ወትነሥእ ፡ ደሞ ፡ ወትክዑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ [ምሥዋዕ ፡] ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዐውዱ ፡ ትነሠንሦ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt kill it, and take the blood and pour it on the altar round about.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt slay the ram, and thou shalt take his blood, and sprinkle it round about upon the altar.

verses.geez: ወትጠብኆ ፡ በበ ፡ መሌሊቱ ፡ ወተኀፅብ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ ውስጡ ፡ ወእገሪሁ ፡ ወታነብር ፡ ርእሶ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዘሌሌከ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt divide the ram by his several limbs, and thou shalt wash the inward parts and the feet with water, and thou shalt put them on the divided parts with the head.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt cut the ram in pieces, and wash the inwards of him, and his legs, and put them unto his pieces, and unto his head.

verses.geez: ወታዐርግ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ በግዖ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ቍርባን ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt offer the whole ram on the altar, a whole burnt-offering to the Lord for a sweet-smelling savour: it is an offering of incense to the Lord.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt burn the whole ram upon the altar: it is a burnt offering unto the LORD: it is a sweet savour, an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

verses.geez: ወንሣእ ፡ በግዐ ፡ ካልአ ፡ ወያነብሩ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወደቂቁ ፡ እደዊሆሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ርእሱ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt take the second ram, and Aaron and his sons shall lay their hands on the head of the ram.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt take the other ram; and Aaron and his sons shall put their hands upon the head of the ram.

verses.geez:
ወሕርዶ ፡ ወንሣእ ፡ እምደሙ ፡ ወአንብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ እዝኑ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ እንተ ፡ የማን ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡
                  አጽባዕተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ዘየማን ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ አጽባዕተ ፡ እግሩ ፡ ዘየማን ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ እዘኒሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡
                  አሮን ፡ ዘየማን ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ አጽባዕተ ፡ እደዊሆሙ ፡ ዘየማን ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ አጽባዕተ ፡ እገሪሆሙ ፡ ዘየማን
                  ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt kill it, and take of the blood of it, and put it on the tip of Aaron's right ear, and on the thumb of his right hand, and on the great toe of his right foot, and on the tips of the right ears of his sons, and on the thumbs of their right hands, and on the great toes of their right feet.
translations.kjv: Then shalt thou kill the ram, and take of his blood, and put it upon the tip of the right ear of Aaron, and upon the tip of the right ear of his sons, and upon the thumb of their right hand, and upon the great toe of their right foot, and sprinkle the blood upon the altar round about.

verses.geez:
ወንሣእ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደም ፡ ዘመሥዋዕት ፡ ወእምውስተ ፡ ቅብእ ፡ ቡሩክ ፡ ወትነሠንሥ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወላዕለ ፡
                  አልባሲሁ ፡ ወእምድኅሬሁ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ደቁ ፡ ወላዕለ ፡ አልባሲሆሙ ፡ ይትቀደስ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወዐራዙ ፡ ወደቁ ፡ ወዐራዞሙ ፡
                  ምስሌሆሙ ፤ ወደሞ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ትክዑ ፡ [ውስተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡] ዐውዶ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt take of the blood from the altar, and of the anointing oil; and thou shalt sprinkle it upon Aaron and on his garments, and on his sons and on his sons' garments with him; and he shall be sanctified and his apparel, and his sons and his sons' apparel with him: but the blood of the ram thou shalt pour round about upon the altar.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt take of the blood that is upon the altar, and of the anointing oil, and sprinkle it upon Aaron, and upon his garments, and upon his sons, and upon the garments of his sons with him: and he shall be hallowed, and his garments, and his sons, and his sons’ garments with him.

verses.geez:
ወትነሥእ ፡ እምውእቱ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ሥብሖ ፡ ወትነሥእ ፡ ሥብሖ ፡ ለዘይገለብብ ፡ ከርሦ ፡ ወትነሥእ ፡ ከብዶ ፡ ወክልኤ ፡
                  ኵልያቶ ፡ ወሥብሐ ፡ ኵሊቱ ፡ ወትነሥእ ፡ እደሁ ፡ ዘየማን ፡ እስመ ፡ በዝ ፡ ይትፌጸም ፤

translations.lxx: And thou shalt take from the ram its fat, both the fat that covers the belly, and the lobe of the liver, and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, and the right shoulder, for this is a consecration.
translations.kjv: Also thou shalt take of the ram the fat and the rump, and the fat that covereth the inwards, and the caul above the liver, and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, and the right shoulder; for it is a ram of consecration:

verses.geez:
ወኅብስ[ተ] ፡ አሐ[ተ] ፡ ዘበቅብእ ፡ [ወ]ጸሪቀተ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ገሐፍት ፡ ዘውስቴቱ ፡ ንቡር ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘሤሙ ፡ ቅድመ
                  ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And one cake made with oil, and one cake from the basket of unleavened bread set forth before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And one loaf of bread, and one cake of oiled bread, and one wafer out of the basket of the unleavened bread that is before the LORD:

verses.geez:
ወታነብር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወውስተ ፡ እደወ ፡ ደቂቁ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወትፈልጦሙ ፡ ፍልጠተ ፡ ለቅድመ
                  ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt put them all on the hands of Aaron, and on the hands of his sons, and thou shalt separate them as a separate offering before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt put all in the hands of Aaron, and in the hands of his sons; and shalt wave them for a wave offering before the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወትትሜጠዎ ፡ እምእደዊሆሙ ፡ ወትቄርቦ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መሥዋዕት ፡ ለመዐዛ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ለቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወፍርየት ፡
                  ውእቱ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt take them from their hands, and shalt offer them up on the altar of whole burnt-offering for a sweet-smelling savour before the Lord: it is an offering to the Lord.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt receive them of their hands, and burn them upon the altar for a burnt offering, for a sweet savour before the LORD: it is an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወትነሥእ ፡ ተላዖ ፡ ለበግ[ዐ] ፡ ተፍጻሜት ፡ ዘውእቱ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወትፈልጦ ፡ ፍልጣነ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ወይኩንከ ፡ እንተ ፡ ባሕቲቱ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt take the breast from the ram of consecration which is Aaron's, and thou shalt separate it as a separate offering before the Lord, and it shall be to thee for a portion.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt take the breast of the ram of Aaron’s consecration, and wave it for a wave offering before the LORD: and it shall be thy part.

verses.geez:
ወትቄድሶ ፡ ተላዖ ፡ ወትፈልጦ ፡ ወመዝራዕቶኒ ፡ ትፈልጥ ፡ በከመ ፡ ፈለጥከ ፡ አባግዐ ፡ ፍጻሜ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ አሮን ፡
                  ወእምኀበ ፡ ደቂቁ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt sanctify the separated breast and the shoulder of removal which has been separated, and which has been removed from the ram of consecration, of the portion of Aaron and of that of his sons.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt sanctify the breast of the wave offering, and the shoulder of the heave offering, which is waved, and which is heaved up, of the ram of the consecration, even of that which is for Aaron, and of that which is for his sons:

verses.geez:
ወይኩኖሙ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፡ ሕ[ገ] ፡ ለዓለም ፡ በኀበ ፡ ውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እስመ ፡ ፍልጣን ፡ ውእቱዝ ፡
                  ወፍልጣን ፡ ለይኩን ፡ በኀበ ፡ ውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እምዝብሐተ ፡ ይዘብሑ ፡ ለፍርቃኖሙ ፡ ፍልጣን ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And it shall be a perpetual statute of the children of Israel to Aaron and his sons, for this is a separate offering; and it shall be a special offering from the children of Israel, from the peace-offerings of the children of Israel, a special offering to the Lord.
translations.kjv: And it shall be Aaron’s and his sons’ by a statute for ever from the children of Israel: for it is an heave offering: and it shall be an heave offering from the children of Israel of the sacrifice of their peace offerings, even their heave offering unto the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወልብሰ ፡ ቅድሳቱ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ለይኩን ፡ ለውሉዱ ፡ እምድኅሬሁ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትቀብኡ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ይፈጽሙ ፡
                  እደዊሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the apparel of the sanctuary which is Aaron's shall be his sons' after him, for them to be anointed in them, and to fill their hands.
translations.kjv: And the holy garments of Aaron shall be his sons’ after him, to be anointed therein, and to be consecrated in them.

verses.geez:
ወሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ለይልበሶ ፡ ካህን ፡ ዘህየንቴሁ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደቂቁ ፡ ዘይበውእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡር ፡
                  ከመ ፡ ይሠየም ፡ ዝ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቅዱሳን ።

translations.lxx: The priest his successor from among his sons who shall go into the tabernacle of witness to minister in the holies, shall put them on seven days.
translations.kjv: And that son that is priest in his stead shall put them on seven days, when he cometh into the tabernacle of the congregation to minister in the holy place.

verses.geez: ወበግ[ዐ] ፡ ዘተፍጻሜት ፡ ትነሥእ ፡ ወታበስል ፡ ሥጋሁ ፡ በመካን ፡ ቅዱስ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt take the ram of consecration, and thou shalt boil the flesh in the holy place.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt take the ram of the consecration, and seethe his flesh in the holy place.

verses.geez:
ወይበልዕ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወደቂቁ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ወኅብስተ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ገሐፍት ፡ በኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡር
                  ፤

translations.lxx: And Aaron and his sons shall eat the flesh of the ram, and the loaves in the basket, by the doors of the tabernacle of witness.
translations.kjv: And Aaron and his sons shall eat the flesh of the ram, and the bread that is in the basket, by the door of the tabernacle of the congregation.

verses.geez:
ይብልዕዎ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ተቀደሰ ፡ በህየ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይፈጽም ፡ እደዊሆሙ ፡ ቀድሶቶሙ ፡ ወውሉደ ፡ ባዕድ ፡ ኢይብልዖ ፡ እስመ
                  ፡ ቅዱስ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: They shall eat the offerings with which they were sanctified to fill their hands, to sanctify them; and a stranger shall not eat of them, for they are holy.
translations.kjv: And they shall eat those things wherewith the atonement was made, to consecrate and to sanctify them: but a stranger shall not eat thereof, because they are holy.

verses.geez:
ወለእመ ፡ ተርፈ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ መሥዋዕት ፡ ዘተፍጻሜት ፡ ወእምኅብስትኒ ፡ እስከ ፡ ደገደግ ፡ ታውዕዮ ፡ በእሳት
                  ፡ ለዘ ፡ ተርፈ ፡ ወኢትብላዕ ፡ እስመ ፡ ቅዱስ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And if aught be left of the flesh of the sacrifice of consecration and of the loaves until the morning, thou shalt burn the remainder with fire: it shall not be eaten, for it is a holy thing.
translations.kjv: And if ought of the flesh of the consecrations, or of the bread, remain unto the morning, then thou shalt burn the remainder with fire: it shall not be eaten, because it is holy.

verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዝኩከ ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትፈጽም ፡ እደዊሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And thus shalt thou do for Aaron and for his sons according to all things that I have commanded thee; seven days shalt thou fill their hands.
translations.kjv: And thus shalt thou do unto Aaron, and to his sons, according to all things which I have commanded thee: seven days shalt thou consecrate them.

verses.geez:
ወላህመ ፡ ዘእንበይነ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ትገብር ፡ በዕለት ፡ በዘ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ታነጽሕ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ትቄድስ ፡ ቦቱ ፡
                  ወትቀብኦ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt sacrifice the calf of the sin-offering on the day of purification, and thou shalt purify the altar when thou dost perform consecration upon it, and thou shalt anoint it so as to sanctify it.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt offer every day a bullock for a sin offering for atonement: and thou shalt cleanse the altar, when thou hast made an atonement for it, and thou shalt anoint it, to sanctify it.

verses.geez:
ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ታነጽሖ ፡ ለምሥዋዕ ፡ ወትቄድ[ሶ] ፡ ወይኩን ፡ ምሥዋዒከ ፡ ቅዱሰ ፡ ቅዱሳን ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ዘለከፎ ፡
                  ለውእቱ ፡ መሥዋዕት ፡ ለይትቀደስ ።

translations.lxx: Seven days shalt thou purify the altar and sanctify it; and the altar shall be most holy, every one that touches the altar shall be hallowed.
translations.kjv: Seven days thou shalt make an atonement for the altar, and sanctify it; and it shall be an altar most holy: whatsoever toucheth the altar shall be holy.

verses.geez:
ወዝውእቱ ፡ ዘትገብር ፡ ለምሥዋዕ ፤ አባግዐ ፡ እለ ፡ አሐቲ ፡ ዓመቶሙ ፡ ንጹሓነ ፡ ፪ለዕለት ፡ ለወትር ፡ ወፍርየታ ፡
                  ዘወትር ፡ ዘበግዕ ።

translations.lxx: And these are the offerings which thou shalt offer upon the altar; two unblemished lambs of a year old daily on the altar continually, a constant offering.
translations.kjv: Now this is that which thou shalt offer upon the altar; two lambs of the first year day by day continually.

verses.geez: ወአሐደ ፡ በግዐ ፡ ትገብር ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ ወአሐደ ፡ ፍና ፡ ሰርክ ።

translations.lxx: One lamb thou shalt offer in the morning, and the second lamb thou shalt offer in the evening.
translations.kjv: The one lamb thou shalt offer in the morning; and the other lamb thou shalt offer at even:

verses.geez:
ወ[ዐሥራ]ታ ፡ ለኢን ፡ ዘስንዳሌ ፡ ልፉጽ ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ወልቱም ፡ ወራብዕታ ፡ ለኢን ፤ [ወ]ሞጻሕተ ፡ ወይን ፡ ራብዕታ
                  ፡ ለኢን ፡ ለ፩በግዕ ።

translations.lxx: And a tenth measure of fine flour mingled with the fourth part of an hin of beaten oil, and a drink-offering the fourth part of a hin of wine for one lamb.
translations.kjv: And with the one lamb a tenth deal of flour mingled with the fourth part of an hin of beaten oil; and the fourth part of an hin of wine for a drink offering.

verses.geez:
ወለካልእሰ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ዘትገብር ፡ ፍና ፡ ሰርክ ፡ በሐሳበ ፡ ምሥዋዕከ ፡ ዘነግሀ ፡ ትገብሮ ፡ ወከማሁ ፡ ሞጻሕተ ፡
                  ትገብር ፡ ለመዐዛ ፡ ሠናድ ፡ ወፍርየት ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt offer the second lamb in the evening, after the manner of the morning-offering, and according to the drink-offering of the morning lamb; thou shalt offer it an offering to the Lord for a sweet-smelling savour,
translations.kjv: And the other lamb thou shalt offer at even, and shalt do thereto according to the meat offering of the morning, and according to the drink offering thereof, for a sweet savour, an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

verses.geez:
መሥዋዕት ፡ ለወትር ፡ በትውልድክሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡር ፡ በቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወበዛቲ ፡
                  እትኤመር ፡ ለከ ፡ በህየ ፡ ከመ ፡ እንብብከ ።

translations.lxx: a perpetual sacrifice throughout your generations, at the door of the tabernacle of witness before the Lord; wherein I will be known to thee from thence, so as to speak to thee.
translations.kjv: This shall be a continual burnt offering throughout your generations at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation before the LORD: where I will meet you, to speak there unto thee.

verses.geez: ወእኤዝዝ ፡ በህየ ፡ ለውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወእት[ቄ]ደስ ፡ በክብርየ ።

translations.lxx: And I will there give orders to the children of Israel, and I will be sanctified in my glory.
translations.kjv: And there I will meet with the children of Israel, and the tabernacle shall be sanctified by my glory.

verses.geez: ወእቄድሳ ፡ ለደብተራ ፡ መርጡር ፡ ወለምሥዋዒሃ ፡ ወለአሮን ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፡ እቄድሶሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይሡዑ ፡ ሊተ ።

translations.lxx: And I will sanctify the tabernacle of testimony and the altar, and I will sanctify Aaron and his sons, to minister as priests to me.
translations.kjv: And I will sanctify the tabernacle of the congregation, and the altar: I will sanctify also both Aaron and his sons, to minister to me in the priest’s office.

verses.geez: ወእሰመይ ፡ በውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወእከውኖሙ ፡ አምላከ ።

translations.lxx: And I will be called upon among the children of Israel, and will be their God.
translations.kjv: And I will dwell among the children of Israel, and will be their God.

verses.geez:
ወያአምሩ ፡ ከመ ፡ አነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላኮሙ ፡ ዘአውጻእክዎሙ ፡ እምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ከመ ፡ እሰመይ ፡
                  ሎሙ ፡ ወእኩኖሙ ፡ አምለኮሙ ።

translations.lxx: And they shall know that I am the Lord their God, who brought them forth out of the land of Egypt, to be called upon by them, and to be their God.
translations.kjv: And they shall know that I am the LORD their God, that brought them forth out of the land of Egypt, that I may dwell among them: I am the LORD their God.
